name: fr.intrane/peage-mcp
description: Give your agent a prepaid fiat wallet: pay any API per call in cents, no crypto, spend caps.

environmentVariables.name: PEAGE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Rail instance to target (default https://peage.intrane.fr). Point at a self-hosted or staging rail.

environmentVariables.name: PEAGE_WALLET_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Existing wallet token (pw_...). If unset, peage_setup mints one and stores it at ~/.peage-mcp.json.
